title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.090 - Prosecuting witness to give security for costs, when
text:
66.090.  Prosecuting witness to give security for costs, when. — In the event a complaint is made by a person other than the county counselor or a peace officer, the court may require the complainant to give security for the costs in such action.
(L. 1951 p. 397 § 9, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
